item.name: Hatchetfish
item.description:
The Ruby Sea hatchetfish earns its name from its overgrown head which, if you squint hard enough, might appear similar to the head of a timberlord's hatchet.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The bioluminescent organs that cause this slight-bodied fish to glow in the dark are sometimes mistaken by fishers for drowned spirits lost at sea from afar, but there is no mistaking the wavekin's disproportionately enormous head.
